name: Nephew
summary: Nephew — the Orchestrator Agent by Avery Gooman. Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code (forked from Ruflo) — researcher / coder / reviewer /…
description: Nephew — the Orchestrator Agent by Avery Gooman. Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code (forked from Ruflo) — researcher / coder / reviewer / witness-curator / federation-coordinator agents, an Ed25519-signed witness manifest (ADR-103), and cross-installation federation over WireGuard. Project-scoped via `.mcp.json`; auto-attaches in every Claude Code session opened at a repo that adopts it. Native CLI for witness operations + Tier B cross-repo federation; everything else passes through to upstream Ruflo until native implementations land.
author: marvelousempire
